title: Marble Match Classic
description: Jungle Marble is a marble shoot game with the theme of Egyptian mythology. Jungle Marble Pop Blast is a marble shoot game with the theme of Egyptian mythology. It is easy to play, but truly addictive.
instructions: 1 Tap screen where you want to shoot marbles 2 match 3 or more same color marbles to make blast 3 Swap the shooting marble by touching the marble emitter 4 You can use props to make the game easy
